TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Toweng_si, title = Toweng_si, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Toweng_si} }

S.FORM: Toweng si mki sku Takaw Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 969.43 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 871.9 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 86.77 km¬≤), 4,172 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,320 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,872 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun, Hla'aluwa ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Toweng si ays psgayun 8 ru 14 alang. 14 alang hani ga, Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , S Čhl Čngan Č/Sulungan , R Čhl Čc Č/Haising , Su'aci , Kal Čv Čnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni .

Toweng si mki sku Takaw Si. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 969.43 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 871.9 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 86.77 km¬≤), 4,172 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,320 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,872 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 93%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun, Hla'aluwa ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Toweng si ays psgayun 8 ru 14 alang. 14 alang hani ga, Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , S Čhl Čngan Č/Sulungan , R Čhl Čc Č/Haising , Su'aci , Kal Čv Čnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni .
S.PHON: toweŇč s~…ēi mki s~…ēku takaw s~…ēi. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.* km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na ő≤unun, ńßla Ēaluwa ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u toweŇč s~…ēi ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, ¶~ ®ius~…ēinlun , ńßus~…ēi*a , tamańßu , s~…ē*ńßl*Ňčan*/s~…ēuluŇčan , r*ńßl* ¶~ ®*/ńßais~…ēiŇč , s~…ēu Ēa ¶~ ®i , kal***Ňča/Ňčani , taŇčuńßla/*inkam , mizuńßu , ua-as~…ēik , la*ulan , *akus~…ē , mas~…ēuńßuaz , *ai-ni .
